name: rpg-travel
displayName: RPG Travel: Game Pilgrimage · RPG 旅行：游戏圣地巡礼
description: Map game scenes to real-world travel plans with RPG-style adventure maps

install.description: Checks for python3, flyai CLI, and node.js. Reports missing dependencies with install hints.

requiredBinaries.name: python3
requiredBinaries.purpose: Run generate_map.py to render HTML and text taskbook

requiredBinaries.name: flyai
requiredBinaries.purpose: FlyAI CLI — query real flight, hotel, attraction, and food data from Fliggy platform

requiredCredentials.name: flyai_account
requiredCredentials.purpose: FlyAI CLI authentication (API key or account credentials)
requiredCredentials.storageRecommendation: Configure via official FlyAI CLI local config, not in chat or skill files

outbound.purpose: Fetch game screenshots for adventure map background (read-only GET)
Fallback landmark images from Wikimedia Commons (read-only GET)

networkAccess.dataCollected: None — all requests are read-only image fetches, no user data transmitted

privacy.localOutput: Generates HTML/TXT files in current working directory only
privacy.credentialHandling: Skill does not store or transmit user credentials. FlyAI credentials are managed by FlyAI CLI independently.
privacy.thirdPartyRequests: Generated HTML embeds external image URLs. Opening the HTML in a browser will cause client-side GET requests to Steam, HDQWalls, PAKUTASO, and Wikimedia, revealing IP and User-Agent.
recommendations: Configure FlyAI credentials only via official CLI mechanisms
For privacy-sensitive use, download images locally before opening HTML
